summary: Iteration 34: Tested all 5 new SSC Track ERP features - Cashier PIN login, Shift management, Order status display, Menu items management, and Dashboard widget customization. All features working correctly after bug fixes.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent (console warning only, doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: PIN login success (POST /api/cashier/login with pin=1234)
Backend: PIN login invalid returns 401
Backend: Shift start with opening cash (POST /api/cashier/shift/start)
Backend: Get current shift with totals (GET /api/cashier/shift/current)
Backend: End shift with closing cash (POST /api/cashier/shift/end)
Backend: Shift calculates expected cash correctly (opening + cash sales)
Backend: Order status endpoint requires no auth (GET /api/order-status/active)
Backend: Order status returns preparing and ready arrays
Backend: Order status supports branch filter
Backend: Get menu items (GET /api/cashier/menu)
Backend: Create menu item (POST /api/cashier/menu)
Backend: Update menu item (PUT /api/cashier/menu/{id})
Backend: Delete menu item (DELETE /api/cashier/menu/{id})
Backend: Upload menu item image (POST /api/cashier/menu/{id}/image)
Backend: Delete menu item image (DELETE /api/cashier/menu/{id}/image)
Backend: Invalid file type rejected for image upload
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint returns widget data
Frontend: Cashier login page with PIN keypad loads correctly
Frontend: PIN keypad buttons (1-9, 0, Clear, Back) all functional
Frontend: PIN login navigates to /cashier/pos on success
Frontend: POS page shows menu items, cart, categories
Frontend: Shift button opens shift management modal
Frontend: Shift modal shows opening cash, total sales, payment breakdown
Frontend: Shift modal shows expected cash calculation
Frontend: Closing cash input and End Shift button available
Frontend: Order Status page loads without authentication
Frontend: Order Status shows Preparing and Ready for Pickup columns
Frontend: Order Status displays live clock with date
Frontend: Order Status shows auto-refresh indicator (3 seconds)
Frontend: Menu Items page shows all 26 menu items in grid
Frontend: Menu Items has Add Item button, search, category filter
Frontend: Menu item cards show Upload button on hover for images
Frontend: Dashboard shows Customize Widgets button
Frontend: Widget Settings dialog has 7 widget toggles
Frontend: Dashboard theme selector (Default, Dark, Blue, Green)
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats, charts, cash/bank widgets
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Cashier PIN login was failing because employee query checked 'status=active' but employees have 'active=True' field. Fixed to check both.
Fixed bug: get_current_user dependency only looked in users collection - PIN-authenticated employees weren't found. Added fallback to employees collection with virtual user creation.
Fixed bug: Virtual user for employee had empty email which failed Pydantic validation. Added placeholder email generation (cashier.{id}@example.com).
seed_data_creation: PIN 1234 set for employee 'aaaa' (employee without user_id for virtual user testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 complete. All 5 new features verified: (1) Dashboard widget customization - 7 toggleable widgets stored in localStorage; (2) Cashier shift management - start/end with cash count, shows payment breakdown and expected cash calculation; (3) Order status display at /order-status - public page with Preparing and Ready columns, auto-refresh every 3 seconds; (4) Cashier PIN login at /cashier - PIN 1234 works, auto-login on 4 digits (requires Sign In button click); (5) Menu item images - upload/delete endpoints working, image displayed on cards. Bug fixes applied to support PIN-authenticated employees without user accounts.
